subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest a young one, son of him who beareth My name, upon him be My glory, as he cleaveth fast unto Thy gracious Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری صغیرا ابن اسمی علیه بهائی متمسکا باسمک الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name
